name: Five Shifts at Tracen Academy's Special Care Centre || Five BORING and STUPID Nights at some underground Quarantine zone for horse girls that have enough power to bend you in half || Uma Musume
description:
"What's that sound? Someone nutting there!? Busting a fat one thinking I was unaware!"

[You heard about that job offer to be a security guard, right? Sucks that someone already got the job before you.... But fret not! You got a job offer as some.... maintenance guy? Oh well! Cant be that hard, Right?]

To Clarify (Before someone starts calling me things for including Teio), ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+!

CONTEXT:

-You are NOT a nightguard, you are some MAINTANACE guy... or gal....

-Basically your role is to make sure the uma's are alright for your shift

-No, you dont spend a whole night there

-You just have tasks

-Remember Sister location? It's supposed to be like that

-Except the Funtime foxy part is cut here

-We (Me and Rem) Had no idea how to fit the 'Ballora' Part into this

-Because there aint no spring lock suits here

-Or small creepy dolls that crawl into suits

-.... So there are 4 task nights... and one special night!

-Don't worry! You got one of those yellow "HandUnit" thing's Tazuna gave you! She will communicate with you through it!

The MAIN threat's in this bot are:

Oguri Cap

Air Groove

Tokai Teio and Symboli Rudolf

???

(Tazuna will explain what to do with each one! However she may not be the greatest in explaining their needs..... Maybe someone else can?)

(Air Groove feels so forced into this one after a few testings :broken_heart:)

Woah.... Thanks rem for the help with tinkering this one.....

Tried to make something MORE interactable.

Like... If you thought the first fnaf inspired uma bot was cool

then THIS one is even better

...

But of course, LLm tends to be quirky

So i have NO idea if it will listen to the 'Events' During the night or not.....

So yeah, This is a chaotic mess of a prequel....

...

Yknow, maybe i could have made this better

But eh........

Deepseek just refuses to aknowledge my visions

...

Yea, blame the llm!

Also

I think it should be obvious with the token count.... but

proxy is recommended

And yes, the bot is... icky!

Some things were changed along the way, some not

like a certain 'Prince' of a woman was planned..... but meh!

Honestly liked the first part more

Becuase it was actually fnaf

And this?

Feels like an mere mimicry of sister location

Blegh..........

Maybe i should just make some other fnaf game instead of a complicated one......

YOU guys should tell me.......

Which fnaf game should i focus on the next bot?

This one is just uh.... complicated?

Baaahhhhhhhh, the FNAF 4 Inspired uma bot is..... GOING to be cooked by Rem (A friend of mine)

Might not be smut, or may be smut.

it's up to rem, let em cook

...

So the next fnaf uma bot will either be:

Fnaf 2, Fnaf 3 or Fnaf 6... No im not making any based on those fresh-er fnaf games, i dont like them.

Hrm, Im supposed to end this here

But i feeeeeelllll like i forgot something

Oh i know!

My DOGSHIT Opinion!

....

Okay maybe THIS wil not make you want to execute me

(I fucking hate the league event, it made me hate some horses more than ever seeing those filthy meta maxxers..... tsk tsk tsk....)

-Uhhh....... Hmm..... hrrmmm....... Thirsty Thursday? I'm not that big of a music guy (I do not want to be shunned for my tastes)

Artist:
creator: Komixo
